citation: Republic Act No. 7394 — Article 50 (Deceptive, unfair, or unconscionable sales acts)
summary: Advertising must not contain false, deceptive, or misleading representations about product characteristics, benefits, or pricing.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Misleading price, discount, feature, or benefit representations. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation or qualification. CHECK: Price basis, comparative claims, and material omissions. ESCALATE IF: Systematic deception or bait-and-switch pricing.
